hooks.command: f="$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude-refine/.draft-requirement.md"; if [ -f "$f" ]; then m=$(stat -f %m "$f" 2>/dev/null || stat -c %Y "$f"); if [ $(($(date +%s) - m)) -lt 60 ]; then printf '{"decision":"block","reason":"/refine has finished. Now invoke the claude-refine:-internal-post-draft skill on the produced .draft-requirement.md."}'; fi; fi
